title: Figure 1 from: Yang J-H, Toda MJ, Suwito A, Hashim R, Gao J-J (2017) A new species group in the genus Dichaetophora, with descriptions of six new species from the Oriental region (Diptera, Drosophilidae). ZooKeys 665: 121-146. https://doi.org/10.3897/zookeys.665.11609
